name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.68: adds learned alias matching to the receipt cost feature (v5.67). New global receipt_aliases table maps a supplier line description to the product an operator confirmed it as; on confirm, each matched line is recorded. Receipt extraction now checks learned aliases FIRST (before barcode and tokenized name), giving a confident auto-match for descriptions seen before regardless of how terse the supplier name is, so repeat receipts are mostly pre-matched. Name matching uses size-aware tokenization (keeps 330/500/55 size numbers, drops pack counts) and auto-matches only a single clear candidate, else returns the top few for review. Cumulative over v5.67 (receipts/receipt_lines, costPriceNetIsk, extract/confirm routes, net-preferring profit report).
